hook: The first goal after a breakup is often not closure; it is stability.
body: Basic routines, sleep, movement, and social connection usually do more for recovery than chasing one perfect explanatory conversation.

hook: Men often wait to rebuild structure until they feel better, when structure may be part of what makes feeling better possible.
body: Treat stability as medicine, not as a side project after the emotions are over.

hook: Treat stability as medicine, not as a side project after the emotions are over.
body: Returning to regular meals, exercise, and time with grounded people can reduce the intensity of the spiral faster than more scrolling or rumination.

hook: Returning to regular meals, exercise, and time with grounded people can reduce the intensity of the spiral faster than more scrolling or rumination.
body: Rebuild one daily routine immediately instead of waiting to feel motivated to start.
